meaning: n.[生理]生物声纳(某些动物在运动时利用自身产生的声反射的制导系统)
examples: The program trains about 75 Pacific bottlenose dolphins, with natural biosonar that tracks better than any manmade device;
Directivity and sound diffraction of the pinna of the Megaderma spasma are studied to predict the the role of these outer ear extensions in the biosonar system.
